content.text: The monitoring parent directory needs to be created first, then the subdirectories.
All directories are created. Now let me write all 9 page files.

All 9 Next.js page wrapper files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of every file and its location:

1. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\dashboard\page.tsx`** -- Renders `Dashboard` with `onBack`, `history`, `onView`, and `onNavigate` props.

2. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\analyze\page.tsx`** -- Renders `Analyze` with `onAnalyze` and `isAnalyzing` props.

3. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\projects\page.tsx`** -- Renders `Projects` with a comprehensive set of props including user data, history, navigation callbacks, credit handling, and analysis state.

4. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\results\page.tsx`** -- Renders `Results` (named export) with analysis data, user, credit/solution handlers, and tab state. Includes a guard that shows a fallback message when `analysisData` is null.

5. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\history\page.tsx`** -- Renders `HistoryView` with `onBack`, `history`, and `onView` props.

6. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\monitoring\ai\page.tsx`** -- Renders `AiMonitoring` with `onBack`, `onNavigate`, `onDeductCredits`, and `user` props.

7. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\monitoring\alerts\page.tsx`** -- Renders `AlertsAEO` with `onBack`, `user`, and `onNavigate` props.

8. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\monitoring\bot-tracking\page.tsx`** -- Renders `BotTracking` with `onBack` and `user` props.

9. **`C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\(app)\monitoring\reputation\page.tsx`** -- Renders `Reputation` with `onBack`, `user`, and `onDeductCredits` props.

All files follow the same pattern: they are `'use client'` components that import `useAppContext` from `@/lib/app-context`, destructure the needed values from context, and pass them as props to the corresponding view component.
